case_title: CLARENCE J BRYANT III VS. ROLANDRIA WALKER et al

docket_entries.description: INJUNCTIVE RELIEF, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRYANT III, CLARENCE J AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, ROLANDRIA AN INDIVIDUAL STEWART, VERN AN INDIVIDUAL PERFORMANCE LENDING, A BUSINESS ENTITY DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-21-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-18-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-06-2009
